meta.note: Quotes, news, earnings & analyst trends are live (Finnhub). Technicals are derived from live price/returns; options chains, IV and flow are modeled (no free options data).

news.headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Wednesday
news.summary: ASML delivered a blowout quarter, and the June wholesale inflation report was softer than expected.

news.headline: Warren Buffett on the market today: 'It's tough to find values when everybody is preferring gambling'
news.summary: The investor has been sharply critical of the stock market, one that he says is increasingly defined by speculative trading as opposed to long-term investing.

news.headline: Buffett says Trump's pick of Kevin Warsh for Fed chair was 'good choice'
news.summary: Warren Buffett believes Fed Chair Kevin Warsh will do the best job he can.

news.headline: Star analyst Dan Ives forms Yorkville Ives merchant bank after leaving Wedbush
news.summary: The new firm, Yorkville Ives & Co., will combine investment banking, equity research, institutional trading and principal investing.

news.headline: Apple Intelligence approved in China with Alibaba Qwen AI model
news.summary: China's cyberspace regulator cleared Apple's AI service on Wednesday, with Alibaba confirming its Qwen model will power the experience across Apple's operating systems

keyLevels.note: Leading the tape at $715.87 — key for risk appetite
Pivot $753.66 — bulls want to hold above

gamePlan: Bias into the open: Neutral — favor defined-risk spreads.
Use QQQ $715.87 as the risk-on/off line; trade with it, not against it.
Primary idea: AMZN CALL — enter $9.20–$10.16, target $14.52+, stop $5.81.
Keep total options exposure modest; one A+ setup beats five marginal ones.
report.narrative: Futures point to a firmer open with QQQ -0.53% and SPY +0.24%. Composite sentiment +18 (Neutral). The tape is being driven mainly by market breadth (a/d), qqq / mega-cap tech, sector rotation. VIX at 14.69 (-0.63%). Environment read: favor defined-risk spreads. Communication (+1.57%) is leading while Energy (-1.19%) lags. Premarket strength in AAPL, MSFT; weakness in AMD, XOM. The desk's highest-conviction setup is AMZN (6.5/10).
report.riskWarning: Options trading is risky and can result in the loss of the entire premium paid. This report provides analysis and educational information only — not financial advice. Size positions small (1–2% of capital per idea), honor stops, and do your own research.
